commit.message:
Strip whitespace from base64 key before decoding in CI

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Race condition - mensajes del cliente se perdían si llegaban durante procesamiento de IA

El bloque finally en scheduleAssistantResponse borraba indiscriminadamente
la cola y timers, causando que mensajes nuevos del cliente que llegaban
mientras el bot aún enviaba su respuesta (ej. imágenes PROMOS_GROUP)
se perdieran silenciosamente. Ahora se hace snapshot de mensajes antes de
procesar y el finally solo limpia si no hay mensajes nuevos pendientes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

theme-color for mobile browsers.

commit.message:
fix: Resolve stale currency reference in cash counter (#32)

* fix: Resolve stale currency reference in saveToLocalStorage callback

Fix currency reference issue in CashCounterModal.tsx saveToLocalStorage function.

- Changed: state.currency → currentState.currency (line 171)
- Issue: state.currency in useCallback dependency could be stale when callback executes
- Fix: Use currentState parameter currency instead of closure state
- Ensures saved currency matches current state, not potentially stale closure value

Build: TypeScript compilation zero errors

* fix: Display typed digits immediately in cash counter page denomination fields

Fix input field issue where typed digits were not visible until blur/Enter.
Changed conditional from checking count to checking inputValue state, matching
modal behavior while maintaining local state to prevent focus loss.

Before: value={count === 0 ? '' : inputValue}
After:  value={inputValue === '' ? '' : inputValue}

This ensures user input is displayed immediately while preserving the
empty placeholder behavior when field is truly empty.

Remove conditional value prop that caused placeholder "0" to remain
visible while typing. Now uses direct inputValue binding with placeholder
handled by HTML behavior.

Changes:
- Remove unnecessary conditional: value={inputValue === '' ? '' : inputValue}
- Use direct value binding: value={inputValue}
- Update useEffect to set empty string when count is 0: count === 0 ? '' : count.toString()

This allows typed digits to display immediately with proper placeholder
behavior matching the modal component.

commit.message:
feat: NFT-style pixel signature for each domain

- Deterministic pixel art generator (10x10 symmetric grid)
- Each domain gets a unique visual identity based on its name hash
- Tier-specific color palettes (legendary=gold, epic=violet, rare=blue, etc.)
- Score influences pattern density (higher score = denser, richer pattern)
- PixelAvatar client component renders on canvas with crisp pixelated rendering
- Integrated into domain cards (80px) and detail pages (160px)
- 6 new unit tests for pixel signature generation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Best-of pages: Changed og:type from 'website' to 'article' for better E-E-A-T
- Tool review schema: Add inLanguage and sameAs for editorial team
- Consistent OpenGraph authorship signals across all article-type pages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf(website): defer gtag.js to idle + lazy-load web-vitals (SMI-2421, SMI-2420) (#258)

SMI-2421: Move gtag.js 149KB network fetch off critical path by dynamically
creating the <script> element inside requestIdleCallback (timeout: 3s) with
setTimeout(fn, 1) fallback for Safari <16.4. Consent Mode v2 defaults remain
synchronous — only the network fetch is deferred.

Applied to BaseLayout.astro, login.astro, and signup.astro (all three pages
duplicate the inline gtag block).

SMI-2420: Convert web-vitals.ts from side-effect import to named export
registerWebVitals(). BaseLayout calls it inside an astro:page-load listener.
onLCP/CLS/INP are registered promptly on page-load (not inside
requestIdleCallback) to avoid missing LCP events before the idle callback fires.

Co-authored-by: Ryan Smith <wrsmith108@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

- work-order-panel-component.md: fix panel width (520→591px), form padding (28/32→24px),
  field gap (22→24px), add prefillEndDate input, document zoom-block end date logic
  and date text color states (placeholder #CBD5E1 → user-set #030929)
- design-system.md: correct status badge border-radius (20px pill → 5px, per Sketch measurement)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add defect triage test harness: backend test server + frontend Test Console

Backend (port 3001):
- test-server.ts bypasses Bedrock, calls 6 MCP tool functions directly
- POST /api/analyze-defect runs full triage pipeline with parallel execution
- POST /api/tools/:name for individual tool calls, GET /api/tools for schemas

Frontend (/agent-chat):
- Two-panel layout: chat messages + structured TriageResultCard
- 6-section result display: classification, severity, routing, MEL, ATA, history

commit.message:
docs: add secrets architecture research + placeholder secrets client

Research 6 approaches for keeping Schwab API keys invisible to AI agents
(Claude Code runs as the same OS user and can read anything on disk).

Recommended architecture:
- Dev: secrets proxy service (credentials in separate process memory)
- Prod: Docker secrets (injected at runtime via /run/secrets/)
- Alt dev: 1Password CLI with biometric gate

Includes src/lib/secrets.ts with unified interface supporting both
Docker secrets and proxy mode, with automatic environment detection.

See docs/secrets-architecture.md for full analysis.

commit.message:
docs: add Postman collection for jwk-poc-api

20 requests across 5 folders:

1. Health & Info (4 requests)
   - App health check
   - Auth server connection config
   - spring-auth-service reachability check
   - OIDC discovery proxy

2. Token Fetch — No Auth (5 requests)
   - Fetch token (default scope) — auto-saves access_token
   - Fetch token (internal.read only)
   - Fetch token (both scopes)
   - Read-only shortcut endpoint
   - Invalid scope negative test

3. Protected Endpoints (3 requests)
   - /protected/me — JWT claims debug
   - /protected/data — business data (main endpoint)
   - /protected/admin — role check

4. End-to-End Flow (4 requests)
   - Step 1: health check
   - Step 2: fetch token (auto-save)
   - Step 3: access protected data
   - Step 4: verify token details

5. Negative Tests (4 requests)
   - No token → 401
   - Invalid/tampered token → 401
   - Expired token → 401
   - Malformed format → 401

All requests include test scripts with assertions.
Token auto-saved to collection variable on fetch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: critical re.sub TypeError in analytical answer post-processing

re.sub(pattern, repl, string) was called with answer.strip() as the
repl argument (2nd positional) and missing the 'string' argument entirely.
This threw TypeError on EVERY analytical task answer, causing the outer
try/except to return JSON-RPC error instead of the computed answer.

Fix: pass '' as repl and answer.strip() as the string to search.

commit.message:
Fix Docker/MySQL startup errors

ical.routes.ts: Remove custom keyGenerator that passed req.ip directly
to express-rate-limit. express-rate-limit v7+ flags this as a potential
IPv6 bypass (ERR_ERL_KEY_GEN_IPV6). The built-in default already handles
IPv6 correctly, so the custom keyGenerator was unnecessary.

017_add_missing_indexes.ts: Replace sqlite_master index existence checks
(SQLite-only) with try/catch around each index creation that ignores
duplicate-key errors. The old approach always returned an empty result on
MySQL/MariaDB, causing the migration to attempt creating indexes that
already existed and crash with ER_DUP_KEYNAME.

* feat(application): rewrite Chess.java as JavaFX Application entry point

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(application): add FXML screens and controllers (menu, settings, dialogs)

Add 6 FXML layouts and 6 JavaFX controllers for Tasks 8-12:
- main-menu.fxml + MainMenuController: branding panel and nav buttons
- settings.fxml + SettingsController: theme, board, language, player name settings
- offline-setup.fxml + OfflineSetupController: local game setup dialog
- online-setup.fxml + OnlineSetupController: online game setup with IP/port validation
- promotion.fxml + PromotionController: pawn promotion piece selector
- waiting.fxml + WaitingController: join-code display while waiting for opponent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(application): add GameController stub to unblock compilation

SceneManager references GameController (Task 14). Add a minimal stub with
the correct constructor signature so the application module compiles while
the full game screen implementation is pending.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(application): port ExecuteMove from SwingWorker to JavaFX Task

Replace SwingWorker.execute() call sites in ChessGame with Thread.start()
to keep old Swing file compiling; fix ChessTest setUp to use no-arg Chess()
constructor after the JavaFX Application rewrite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(application): add game screen FXML and GameController (GameObserver)

GameController fully implements GameObserver, uses Platform.runLater for
all UI updates from the observer callback, and delegates move execution
to ExecuteMove via a single-thread ExecutorService.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(application): delete Swing code and fill ChessTest with facade assertions

Removed all 24 Swing UI files from components/ and window/ packages.
Zero javax.swing or java.awt imports remain in src/main/.
Replaced empty ChessTest stubs with 10 assertions covering the Chess
facade (state, board, players, legal squares, move list, end-game
null-safety, and exception guards). All 30 application tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: update run commands for JavaFX migration

* fix(fxml): move ToggleGroup declarations into fx:define blocks

ToggleGroup is not a Node and cannot be a direct child of layout
containers (HBox/VBox). Moved all ToggleGroup declarations into
<fx:define> blocks in settings.fxml and online-setup.fxml.

* change

* docs: add UI overhaul design document

Approved design covering color system, button unification,
OverlayManager (in-window dialogs), board scaling, and game-end overlay.

* docs: add UI overhaul implementation plan (9 tasks)

* style: overhaul CSS color tokens, button system, overlay styles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Change run config to JavaFX

* style(css): move ghost bg and overlay shadow to theme files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style(fxml): rename button classes, add overlay-card to dialog roots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(fxml): use dedicated online ruleset i18n key, add promotion minWidth

* feat(nav): add OverlayManager for in-window dimmed overlay dialogs

* fix(nav): add finally guards to ensure overlay cleanup on exception

* feat(nav): persistent root StackPane, wire OverlayManager into SceneManager

Replace the old showDialog() OS-level Stage approach with an in-window
overlay system. SceneManager now keeps a persistent StackPane as the
scene root; swapScene() replaces only index 0 on navigation. OverlayManager
is constructed once and wired in. showOverlay(), showConfirm(), and
dismissOverlay() are exposed publicly. A @Deprecated showDialog() bridge
is retained for source compatibility until Task 5 updates all callers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(nav): guard overlayManager null access with requireOverlay() helper

* feat(controllers): replace Stage.close() with Runnable closeAction, wire showOverlay

All dialog controllers (OfflineSetupController, OnlineSetupController,
WaitingController, PromotionController) now accept a Runnable closeAction
injected at construction time and call closeAction.run() to dismiss themselves,
removing the broken Stage.close() pattern for in-window overlays.

MainMenuController and GameController updated to pass sceneManager::dismissOverlay
and use showOverlay() instead of showDialog().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(app): use i18n for error messages, validate join code, remove dead fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(app): i18n player names in offline and online setup controllers

Replace hardcoded English strings "You", "Opponent", "Player White", and
"Player Black" with i18n.get(...) calls using new keys:
- dialog.online.player.you / dialog.online.player.opponent
- dialog.offline.default.white / dialog.offline.default.black

Re-add I18n field and constructor param to OfflineSetupController.
Update MainMenuController to pass i18n when constructing OfflineSetupController.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(app): add game-end overlay FXML and GameEndController

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(app): remove dead chess/sceneManager fields from GameEndController

Removed unused `Chess chess` and `SceneManager sceneManager` fields,
their constructor parameters, and the corresponding imports. The
constructor now only accepts the parameters that are actually used.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(app): board scaling bindings and overlay-based game-end/leave dialogs

- Replace hardcoded 72px square size with DoubleBinding squareSize field
  (min of boardContainer width/height divided by 8), bound to all squares,
  piece ImageViews (0.78x), legal-move Circles (0.19x), and axis labels
- Remove manual width/height listeners that called grid.setPrefSize();
  bind grid pref size directly to boardContainer instead
- Replace Alert game-end dialog with GameEndController overlay via
  sceneManager.showOverlay(); support RETURN and REMATCH choices
- Replace Alert leave-confirm with sceneManager.showConfirm()
- Replace Alert error dialog with sceneManager.showConfirm()
- Remove unused imports: Alert, ButtonType, Optional, DoubleBinding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(app): remove dead import and rename shadowing locals in GameController

- Remove unused `java.util.MissingResourceException` import.
- Rename local String variables `whiteName`/`blackName` in
  `showGameEndDialog()` to `whitePlayerName`/`blackPlayerName` to
  eliminate shadowing of the @FXML Label fields of the same names.
  Updated all references in the GameEndController constructor call
  and the chess.startGame() rematch call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(app): game.fxml sidebar width, board min size, btn-danger

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(app): main menu brand panel gradient, watermark, nav hover accents

- Wrap left branding VBox in StackPane with styleClass menu-brand-panel
- Add watermarkImage ImageView (opacity 0.12) behind branding content
- Increase app title font from 42px to 48px
- Add nav-button-exit styleClass to exit button for red-hover treatment
- Add .menu-brand-panel, .nav-button:hover, .nav-button-exit:hover rules
  to both dark.css and light.css using existing CSS variable tokens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Initial release: Yerkes-Dodson curve for AI agents

22 experiments across 3 phases demonstrating inverted-U
stress-performance relationship in LLM multi-agent systems.
Includes arena engines (v6.1, v7.0), experiment data,
analysis scripts, and arXiv preprint source.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: survival-arena
repository.description: Survival Arena: The Yerkes-Dodson Curve for AI Agents. LLM multi-agent grid-world experiments studying optimal environmental pressure for emergent cooperation.

add new substack posts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: improve HookScene design, BGM (Jamendo), silence trim, 60s minimum

- HookScene: full-width dark box with yellow left border, gradient accent
  bars, yellow JA text (66px) with black outline shadow, white EN subtitle
- step5_voice.py: trim trailing silence from TTS audio via ffmpeg silenceremove
- step6_prepare_render.py: guarantee 60s minimum by padding outro duration
- step7_postprocess.py: replace dead Pixabay Music API with Jamendo API,
  fix NameError (item_id → args.id), tune BGM volume to -8dB
- Root.tsx: calculateMetadata for dynamic durationInFrames (fixes black screen)
- BilingualSubtitle.tsx: paddingBottom 80→280 for YouTube Shorts safe zone
- types.ts / utils.ts: support outro_duration_sec field
- nasa-video.md: fix outro text to canonical value, update 60s/65s thresholds
